reviews.review_description: After buying a few other fighter apps this one is very disappointing. The controls are hard to operate no matter how often you re-centre the environment. And the controls are very unresponsive especially when trying to land I hope the developers take on the feedback and maybe start from scratch I feel like it’s was a waste of money buying this game.

The stic os to muth sansytiv and its not realystic. Its a good gam but the comand are unplsuebel. I sugest to add streph to the stick, mor plans and dont mack pepol pay real mony for mor plan. I thinc you sould also mack all of the intereor interaciv lick laning gear, starting the plane and betor radarlocking system.

This game is very bad, First of all, YOU CAN'T EVEN LAND, One of the tutorials is landing, which isn't realistic as u keep the throttle at max while landing which u don't do when ur actually landing an airplane, but when u go into the free flight mode and try land, it doesn't work, next, the graphics are HORRIBLE, I went to London and the ground was 2D, not 3D with buildings and stuff but 2D, reccomended if ur on a budget for like £5 but if not then DON'T BUY THIS GAME IT SUCKS but no offense to the developers u guys probably spent a long time making it and if u could actually land and the graphics were better than I would do 5 stars

It bad
I regrect buying this game a waste of money i wish i can refund this game

This game was absolute trash. I downloaded it expecting something actually worth playing instead. I got hit with the worst graphics ever and the stick on the plane was super low. I had to reach so far down just to be able to grab it. I even lowered my chair a little bit then I couldn’t see over the navigation display if that’s what the hell you wanna call that sad excuse for a screen don’t buy this game. You will waste your money. 
￼

I was trying to fly normally and do some turns but it felt like absolute rubish
Not fantastic asked for refund
Game play is terrible. Could troll are glitchy. They will not refund money. Avoid at all costs.

reviews.review_title: This game sucks let me get a refund
reviews.review_description: If you are reading this just get war planes air corp its way better and this is just a scam

reviews.review_title: Give it a try its only a few bucks
reviews.review_description: You can tell its a small studio but the ground graphics are nice.  Flight controls need tuning.  Needs quite a bit of work but I will keep it and hope they keep working on it.  They definitely should not be trying to charge extra for anything yet.

reviews.review_title: Glad I gave it a chance!! Insane 💯
reviews.review_description:
I think they’ve improved a lot with their latest updates. This game definitely deserves a chance from more players.
I tried it despite the bad reviews, and honestly, the haptic feedback and flying experience are really satisfying.
The key is not to overuse the flight controller, you must to use it wisely just to steer, and then you’ll really feel more comfortable because you realize that you are driving the plane and the plane is not driving you, that’s the point. 

There are also several planes and maps you can try out, which really boost the overall experience.
Bullet here and bullet there while flying the skies above my head, hell I need more of this, please keep doing this great things! 💪
Can't even use any buttons and crash 😔
I saw this when it had 1.5 🌟 I had to play it. Little did I know it was a 5 🌟  I'm guessing from some reviews people didn't know how to work it. Anyways 10/10
Cool game, but I've tried everything... I get a server error when I try to play with my son.  I thought it was because we were app sharing, so I bought another copy.  Still no good, disappointed 😞
Avoid this..absolutely a pile of turd
Is there a way to move pilot seat further back in the cockpit?

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing. Working on that feature and much more. Please hold on. May be by end of this month.

reviews.review_description: Actually not that bad if your on a budget and want a nice jet experience then it’s not that bad

May be cheaper than other games but even at  its price it's still not good.
Lesson learned > don't buy cheap vr games

reviews.review_title: Not worth it, not a good implementaiton
reviews.review_description:
The controls are horrible, super sensitive and need a lot of work, the two handedness of things i ALL WRONG.. Also the flight simulation model (even if it is arcade) is one of the worse.  Want to be able to experience the game correctly but cant because its just too clunky to control.

Also , out of the four jets the two i really wanted to try to fly where paid DLC (boo!).

In comparison there is another game on meta store (DoJ) that is in early access BUT does EVERYTHING right, maybe the devs for this game should play it a little bit, see how the game should feel like and perform!! 

Not to mention the performance is meh, and can easily get motion sickness because of that.

Too bad i cant refund because i bought as part of a bundle, it wasnt too much $ that im upset, but now i have 3 of these really poorly made games... 

I hope the devs work on it and fix it, there is TONS of untapped potential here, and it is def fixable if they put more work into it, but if they abandon it or leave it as is, it is just PLAIN BAD, would NOT recommend!!

developer_response.body: Much appreciated your detail feedback. We are improving it a lot, hopefully you will like the update.

reviews.review_description: Never even got ot to function need lots of work. Potential could be great

reviews.review_title: Wish I’d never bought it waste of money
reviews.review_description: Horrible graphics
This is actually terrible, refunded it, both f-35 and f-16 you have to pay extra for
Sadly, very poor, hopefully will improve.
Sorry for this but it' s the worst game i ever play, i can only touch 2 things, the acceleration and the stick

developer_response.body: Thanks for feedback. We are adding more hand controls including Eject, Deploying Flares, Radio control and Gear open/close etc. Stay tune for the next updates soon.

reviews.review_description:
I really like this game, especially its style and the look of the landscapes/levels. I recommend it especially for the price! Keep up the good work! It looks great and keeps getting better! 
Can I suggest adding the option to fully control the jets with the quest controller? 🙏
Unless it exists already and I missed it somehow? 
Thx. 

Cheers!

developer_response.body: Thanks for appreciation. Yes we are working on using controller/hand gesture to control the Jet dashboard buttons and gauges. Stay tuned.

reviews.review_description: Bad arcade game not even close to a simulator

developer_response.body: Thanks for trying. Please switch to Professional control instead of Arcade from settings.

reviews.review_description: It not good end €4.99 it just be free 😤😡
Terrible nothing works

developer_response.body: Hi, Would you be willing to share some specific details about what isn't working for you? This information can help us identify and fix the issues as quickly as possible. You can send us a private message or contact our support team directly at info@skippyapps.com.

reviews.review_description: So many bugs and glitches

developer_response.body: Hi, We understand that bugs and glitches can be frustrating, and we appreciate you bringing them to our attention. We are actively working to identify and fix these issues to ensure a smooth gameplay experience for everyone.

reviews.review_title: One of best flying games I tried
reviews.review_description: Easy simple and very engaging

developer_response.body: Hi, We're so glad you find Fighter Jet easy, simple, and engaging! If you have any suggestions for improvement, please don't hesitate to share them. Keep flying high!

reviews.review_description: Not worth it. Not even if it's free.

developer_response.body:
Hi Tony,
I hope you are doing well. I see that you are not happy with this game. I assure you that we are working on improving this game and we would really need your support and suggestions. We have recently included Multiplayer mode so, try it out with your friends and give us your valuable suggestion at admin@skippyapps.com.
If you like this update kindly give us more stars. That would really motivate us to work on more exciting updates.
Thank you

reviews.review_description: I do enjoy the game but there is bugs and glitches and also the physics for the Jets are kind of off and can't roll the Jets it seems like the ground is attached to your jet.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Thank you for the valuable suggestion. We are working on improving this game and we have recently included Multiplayer mode. Kindly try this mode with your friends and give us your valuable suggestion at admin@skippyapps.com.
If you like this update kindly give us more stars. That would make us very happy and motivate us to work on more exciting updates.
